languages.text: {n}...и все же он встает. Встает в полный рост, вытягиваясь по стойке смирно. Израненный и окровавленный, отдает вам честь.{/n} "Тренировочный Бой окончен. Пост командующего 32-м меровский штрафным полком Иждриг Батошски сдал. Дальше без меня, Ваша Светлость".

{n}...and yet he rises. He draws himself up to his full height, standing rigidly to attention. Blood-streaked and broken, he salutes you.{/n} "The Trial Match is over. I, Izdrig Batoshski, step down as commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. It's up to you now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
languages.original_text: {n}...и все же он встает. Встает в полный рост, вытягиваясь по стойке смирно. Израненный и окровавленный, отдает вам честь.{/n} "Тренировочный Бой окончен. Пост командующего 32-м меровский штрафным полком Иждриг Батошски сдал. Дальше без меня, Ваша Светлость".

traits.locale_text: {n}...and yet he rises. He draws himself up to his full height. Standing tall in a rigid stance blood-streaked and broken, he salutes you.{/n} "The Trial Match is over. Izdrig Batoshski is stepping down as commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. It's up to you now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

{n}...and yet he rises. He draws himself up to his full height. Standing tall in a rigid stance blood-streaked and broken, he salutes you.{/n} "The Trial Match is over. Izdrig Batoshski is stepping down as commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. It's up to you now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

{n}...and yet he rises. He draws himself up to his full height, standing rigidly to attention. Blood-streaked and broken, he salutes you.{/n} "The Trial Match is over. I, Izdrig Batoshski, step down as commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. It's up to you now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

{n}...and yet he rises. He draws himself up to his full height, standing rigidly to attention. Blood-streaked and broken, he salutes you.{/n} "The Trial Match is over. I, Izdrig Batoshski, step down as commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. It's up to you now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

{n}...and yet he rises. He draws himself up to his full height, standing rigidly to attention. Blood-streaked and broken, he salutes you.{/n} "The Trial Match is over. I, Izdrig Batoshski, step down as commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. It's up to you now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: {n}……可他还是站了起来。他挺直身躯，僵硬地立正。浑身浴血、遍体鳞伤的他，向你敬了个礼。{/n}“试炼比武结束了。我，伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基，正式卸任梅罗夫第32判罪军团指挥官一职。现在，一切由您定夺，大人。”
languages.original_text: {n}...and yet he rises. He draws himself up to his full height, standing rigidly to attention. Blood-streaked and broken, he salutes you.{/n} "The Trial Match is over. I, Izdrig Batoshski, step down as commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. It's up to you now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}……可他还是站了起来。他挺直身躯，僵硬地立正。浑身浴血、遍体鳞伤的他，向你敬了个礼。{/n}“试炼比武结束了。我，伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基，正式卸任梅罗夫第32判罪军团指挥官一职。现在，一切由您定夺，大人。”

languages.text: {n}Yine de kalkıyor. Tüm boyuyla dikiliyor, dimdik hazır olda bekliyor. Kana bulanmış ve yıkılmış hâlde sana selam veriyor.{/n} "Sınav Karşılaşması sona erdi. Ben, İzdrig Batoshski... 32. Merov Ceza İnfaz Alayı komutanlığından istifa ediyorum. Artık karar sizindir {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: {n}...and yet he rises. He draws himself up to his full height, standing rigidly to attention. Blood-streaked and broken, he salutes you.{/n} "The Trial Match is over. I, Izdrig Batoshski, step down as commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. It's up to you now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Yine de kalkıyor. Tüm boyuyla dikiliyor, dimdik hazır olda bekliyor. Kana bulanmış ve yıkılmış hâlde sana selam veriyor.{/n} "Sınav Karşılaşması sona erdi. Ben, İzdrig Batoshski... 32. Merov Ceza İnfaz Alayı komutanlığından istifa ediyorum. Artık karar sizindir {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: {n}... Et pourtant, le voilà qui se relève. Il se redresse de toute sa hauteur avec solennité. Couvert de sang et en piteux état, il vous salue.{/n} « L'Épreuve par les armes est terminée. Moi, Izdrig Batoshski, cède mon poste de commandant du 32e régiment de la Légion Pénale de Merov. Il vous revient de droit, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: {n}...and yet he rises. He draws himself up to his full height, standing rigidly to attention. Blood-streaked and broken, he salutes you.{/n} "The Trial Match is over. I, Izdrig Batoshski, step down as commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. It's up to you now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}... Et pourtant, le voilà qui se relève. Il se redresse de toute sa hauteur avec solennité. Couvert de sang et en piteux état, il vous salue.{/n} « L'Épreuve par les armes est terminée. « Moi, Izdrig Batoshski, cède mon poste de commandant du 32e régiment de la Légion Pénale de Merov. Il vous revient de droit, Votre Seigneurie. »

languages.text: {n}... Y, aun así, se levanta. Se yergue por completo para cuadrarse rígidamente. Cubierto de sangre y roto, te dedica un saludo militar.{/n} «La prueba de combate ha concluido. Yo, Izdrig Batoshski, le cedo el puesto de comandante del 32.º regimiento penal de Merov. Ahora todo depende de usted, mi{mf|lord|lady}».
languages.original_text: {n}...and yet he rises. He draws himself up to his full height, standing rigidly to attention. Blood-streaked and broken, he salutes you.{/n} "The Trial Match is over. I, Izdrig Batoshski, step down as commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. It's up to you now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}... Y, aun así, se levanta. Se yergue por completo para cuadrarse rígidamente. Cubierto de sangre y roto, te dedica un saludo militar.{/n} «La prueba de combate ha concluido. Yo, Izdrig Batoshski, le cedo el puesto de comandante del 32.º regimiento penal de Merov. Ahora todo depende de usted, mi{mf|lord|lady}».

languages.text: {n}... und doch erhebt er sich. Er richtet sich zu seiner ganzen Größe auf und nimmt steif Haltung an. Blutverschmiert und gebrochen salutiert er vor dir.{/n} "Der Prüfungskampf ist vorbei. Ich, Izdrig Batoshski, trete als Commander des 32. Merov-Strafregiments zurück. Jetzt ist es an Euch, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: {n}...and yet he rises. He draws himself up to his full height, standing rigidly to attention. Blood-streaked and broken, he salutes you.{/n} "The Trial Match is over. I, Izdrig Batoshski, step down as commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. It's up to you now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}... und doch erhebt er sich. Er richtet sich zu seiner ganzen Größe auf und nimmt steif Haltung an. Blutverschmiert und gebrochen salutiert er vor dir.{/n} "Der Prüfungskampf ist vorbei. Ich, Izdrig Batoshski, trete als Commander des 32. Merov-Strafregiments zurück. Jetzt ist es an Euch, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."

languages.text: {n}……それでも、彼は立ち上がる。彼は精一杯の背丈に身を起こし、こわばった直立不動の姿勢をとる。血にまみれ、打ちのめされながらも、彼はあなたに敬礼する。{/n}「試練の手合わせは終わった。私、イズドリグ・バトシュスキーは、メロヴ第三十二懲罰連隊の指揮官の座を退く。あとはあなた次第です、{mf|閣下|閣下}」
languages.original_text: {n}...and yet he rises. He draws himself up to his full height, standing rigidly to attention. Blood-streaked and broken, he salutes you.{/n} "The Trial Match is over. I, Izdrig Batoshski, step down as commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. It's up to you now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}……それでも、彼は立ち上がる。彼は精一杯の背丈に身を起こし、こわばった直立不動の姿勢をとる。血にまみれ、打ちのめされながらも、彼はあなたに敬礼する。{/n}「試練の手合わせは終わった。私、イズドリグ・バトシュスキーは、メロヴ第三十二懲罰連隊の指揮官の座を退く。あとはあなた次第です、{mf|閣下|閣下}」
